@graph.description: Complete digital overhaul for W Ventures, a Berlin-based VC firm. Custom dark-theme UI, GSAP scroll animations, and fully CMS-driven Webflow architecture.

@graph.headline: Complete digital overhaul for W Ventures, a Berlin-based VC firm
@graph.alternativeHeadline: W Ventures — VC Firm Website Relaunch
@graph.name: W Ventures — Complete Digital Overhaul
@graph.abstract: High-performance, CMS-driven Webflow platform designed to position a European VC firm at the level of its portfolio companies.
@graph.description: Complete digital overhaul for W Ventures, a Berlin-based VC firm with a portfolio including Corgi, Klaviyo, Harmattan AI, Numeral, and SmithRx. Custom dark-theme UI with GSAP scroll animations, fully CMS-driven architecture, and SEO-ready structure.
@graph.articleBody:
Context: W Ventures is a Berlin-based venture capital firm with a portfolio of high-profile names — Corgi, Klaviyo, Harmattan AI, Numeral and SmithRx to name a few. Their existing website had fallen behind — visually dated, structurally rigid, and no longer matching the stature of the companies they back. They needed a complete digital overhaul that would stand credibly alongside the caliber of their investments.

Challenge: Unlike a typical VC site built around text and logos, W Ventures needed a design that balances authority with approachability — serious enough for institutional credibility, dynamic enough to attract founders. The UX/UI had to communicate trust and vision simultaneously, while a CMS-driven backend was essential to let the team independently update portfolio companies, news, and team content as the firm scales.

Solution: I led both the UX/UI design and full Webflow development, crafting an interface that pairs clean editorial layouts with purposeful motion. GSAP-powered scroll animations and a custom dark-theme experience give the site a distinctive presence, while the entire content layer — portfolio companies, team bios, news — runs on Webflow's CMS for complete editorial autonomy. Semantic heading structure and performance optimization ensure strong technical SEO foundations throughout.

Outcome: A bold, redesigned digital identity that positions W Ventures as a credible, modern European VC. Custom dark-theme UI with scroll-driven GSAP animations reinforcing the firm's forward-looking brand. Fully CMS-driven architecture — portfolio companies, team, and news all editable without developer support. UX/UI designed and developed end-to-end by TONYTONY, from wireframes through to production. SEO-ready structure with clean document hierarchy and structured data groundwork for future growth.

audience.audienceType: Venture Capital Firms, Startups, Tech Investors

@graph.keywords: Webflow Development, GSAP Animation, CMS Architecture, Technical SEO, UX/UI Design, Dark-theme UI, Venture Capital Website

@graph.reviewBody: In every phase of my projects for leading international ventures, Anthony consistently exhibited a great level of creativity, professionalism, and technical skill - maintaining a proactive approach from initial concept to final delivery.
